_comment: Curated visual aids for Picture Study (art_music) and History maps/artifacts. wiki_title is the exact Wikipedia article title, resolved client-side via the Wikipedia REST summary API for a live thumbnail rather than a hardcoded image URL — keeps this catalog resilient to file/path changes and doesn't require hosting the images ourselves. If a title's thumbnail ever fails to resolve, the UI falls back to a plain text caption instead of a broken image.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
visual_aids.creator: Johannes Vermeer
visual_aids.description: A luminous portrait study — notice the light on her face and the single pearl earring.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Hay Wain
visual_aids.creator: John Constable
visual_aids.description: An English countryside scene — notice the clouds, the water, and the horse-drawn cart.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: Mona Lisa
visual_aids.creator: Leonardo da Vinci
visual_aids.description: Study her expression and the hazy landscape behind her.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Starry Night
visual_aids.creator: Vincent van Gogh
visual_aids.description: Notice the swirling sky and the quiet village below.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: American Gothic
visual_aids.creator: Grant Wood
visual_aids.description: A farmer and his daughter — notice their expressions and the house behind them.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The School of Athens
visual_aids.creator: Raphael
visual_aids.description: Philosophers gathered together — can you find Plato and Aristotle in the center?

visual_aids.subject: history
visual_aids.title: The Roman Empire
visual_aids.description: Trace the boundaries on the map — how far did Rome's reach extend?

visual_aids.subject: history
visual_aids.title: The Roman Forum
visual_aids.description: The heart of ancient Roman public life — imagine the crowds and speeches held here.

visual_aids.subject: history
visual_aids.title: Ancient Egypt
visual_aids.description: Find the Nile River on the map — why might a civilization grow up along it?

visual_aids.subject: history
visual_aids.title: Hadrian's Wall
visual_aids.description: A real wall built to mark and defend the edge of an empire.

visual_aids.subject: history
visual_aids.title: The Bayeux Tapestry
visual_aids.description: A stitched record of a real battle — notice how the story unfolds from left to right.

visual_aids.subject: history
visual_aids.title: The Silk Road
visual_aids.description: Trace the trade routes on the map — what kinds of goods and ideas traveled along them?

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Angelus
visual_aids.creator: Jean-François Millet
visual_aids.description: Two farm workers pause at dusk to pray the Angelus — listen for the distant church bell.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Gleaners
visual_aids.creator: Jean-François Millet
visual_aids.description: Three women gather leftover grain after the harvest — notice their bent backs and the golden light.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Sower
visual_aids.creator: Jean-François Millet
visual_aids.description: A sower strides down the hillside scattering seed — the parable of the sower made paint.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: Man with a Hoe
visual_aids.creator: Jean-François Millet
visual_aids.description: A laborer rests on his hoe in a rough field — what does his posture tell you about his day?

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Annunciation (San Marco)
visual_aids.creator: Fra Angelico
visual_aids.description: The angel Gabriel greets Mary under a painted arcade — notice the folded wings and the quiet.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Coronation of the Virgin
visual_aids.creator: Fra Angelico
visual_aids.wiki_title: Coronation of the Virgin (Fra Angelico, Louvre)
visual_aids.description: Heaven crowded with saints as Mary is crowned — how many faces can you find looking up?

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The San Marco Altarpiece
visual_aids.creator: Fra Angelico
visual_aids.description: Mary and the Child enthroned among saints — an early painting where figures stand in real space.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: Salisbury Cathedral from the Meadows
visual_aids.creator: John Constable
visual_aids.description: A storm passes over the cathedral while a rainbow lands on it — weather and hope in one sky.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Cornfield
visual_aids.creator: John Constable
visual_aids.description: A shepherd boy stops to drink from the stream on the lane — follow the path back into the field.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Sistine Madonna
visual_aids.creator: Raphael
visual_aids.description: Mary carries the Child between parted curtains — and two small angels lean on the ledge below.

visual_aids.subject: art_music
visual_aids.title: The Transfiguration
visual_aids.creator: Raphael
visual_aids.description: Christ rises in light above while the crowd below struggles in shadow — two stories in one painting.
